summary: Current task graph for the OpenAI-compatible M365 Copilot provider gateway, with OpenCode/OpenWork owning UX and execution.

phases.name: Current Architecture Baseline
phases.description: Tracks the product boundaries that already exist in source and must stay aligned with docs and verification artifacts.

tasks.title: OpenCode provider gateway is the live product path
tasks.description: The active product path is OpenCode/OpenWork using Relay as an OpenAI-compatible M365 Copilot provider gateway. The Tauri + Solid shell under apps/desktop is diagnostic support only.

tasks.title: Provider facade and diagnostic IPC contracts are canonical
tasks.description: The provider contract is the OpenAI-compatible HTTP facade in copilot_server.js. Rust source models and command signatures under apps/desktop/src-tauri remain canonical for diagnostic IPC only.
tasks.artifact: docs/IMPLEMENTATION.md (2026-04-12 Core / Client / IPC boundary refactor)

tasks.title: Execution ownership belongs to OpenCode/OpenWork
tasks.description: OpenCode/OpenWork owns sessions, tool execution, permissions, MCP routing, plugins, skills, workspace config, and transcript state. Relay-owned Rust execution is not a product fallback.

phases.name: Repo Hardening Toward Claw-Code Operational Rigor
phases.description: Repository truth cleanup, headless doctor, deterministic parity/session harness, and CI alignment.

tasks.title: Clean up repository source of truth
tasks.description: Align workspace license metadata, remove dead workspace entries, set pnpm check as the canonical provider-safe frontend gate, and update live docs to the provider gateway product path.
tasks.artifact: docs/IMPLEMENTATION.md (2026-04-14 Repo hardening toward claw-code operational rigor)

tasks.title: Add headless relay-agent-doctor
tasks.description: Ship a dedicated doctor binary, shared diagnostics service, root pnpm doctor script, stable JSON report types, and integration coverage for ready/login-required/auth-failure/missing-workspace/missing-runtime-asset cases.

tasks.title: Retain deterministic provider and diagnostic coverage
tasks.description: Keep deterministic provider/diagnostic fixture coverage without linking or retaining the removed Relay-owned runtime/tools/compat harness crates.

tasks.title: Align CI with documented acceptance criteria
tasks.description: Replace Linux-only CI with Ubuntu and Windows coverage, run pnpm check plus diagnostic launch smokes, add docs truth guards, and keep release packaging separate from the main acceptance workflow.
tasks.artifact: docs/IMPLEMENTATION.md (2026-04-14 Repo hardening toward claw-code operational rigor)

phases.name: Provider-Only Hard Cut
phases.description: Remove remaining compatibility posture now that OpenCode/OpenWork is the product UX and execution owner. Relay keeps only provider gateway startup, M365 Copilot CDP transport, OpenCode/OpenWork config support, and diagnostics.

tasks.title: Make OpenCode provider gateway the only primary product path
tasks.description: Update live docs, scripts, task metadata, and diagnostics so first-use guidance starts with OpenCode/OpenWork plus start:opencode-provider-gateway. Desktop launch and smoke paths become diag:* checks only. Do not preserve legacy Relay desktop chat/session/tool execution compatibility.

phases.name: Diagnostic Shell Minimization
phases.description: Shrink the remaining Tauri/Solid shell so it is a provider gateway and diagnostics console, not a parallel chat/session execution product.

tasks.title: Replace chat-first desktop posture with provider diagnostics
tasks.description: Make the desktop first screen provider/diagnostic-oriented. Remove or isolate chat/session stores, approval UI, write undo UI, slash-command surfaces, MCP registry UI, and transcript rendering from the normal UI path. Legacy start_agent and continue_agent_session routing has since been deleted.

tasks.title: Retire legacy agent commands from public IPC
tasks.description: Remove Relay-owned chat/session execution commands from the public Tauri generate_handler list and frontend IPC bridge while leaving internal Rust diagnostic harnesses as deletion targets.

tasks.title: Delete legacy agent Tauri command module
tasks.description: Remove the now-unreachable Tauri command wrapper module for Relay-owned chat/session execution and guard against restoring it.

tasks.title: Retire dev-control legacy agent routes
tasks.description: Remove debug-only localhost routes and package aliases that could still start, continue, or approve Relay-owned desktop agent execution.

tasks.title: Delete orphan desktop live harness scripts
tasks.description: Remove stale dev-control helper scripts and desktop-owned M365 live execution harnesses now that provider gateway live verification is the only supported M365 live path.
tasks.artifact: docs/IMPLEMENTATION.md (2026-04-25 Orphan desktop live harness retirement)

tasks.title: Delete compat-harness crate
tasks.description: Remove the remaining standalone compatibility fixture crate and its vendored historical mock parity manifest now that provider gateway coverage is the supported verification surface.

tasks.title: Delete hard-cut agent wrapper
tasks.description: Remove the internal Relay-owned hard-cut agent controller and now-unused agent-loop config/semaphore plumbing so desktop diagnostics cannot start or continue Relay-owned execution turns.
